REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 029/23/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DONALD A FRANKLIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MELISSA R MEYERS AND JOEL GARZOLL ARE PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANKLIN, DONALD A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MEYERS, MELISSA R GARZOLL, JOEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
